title: Sanborn 48" x 24" Perforated Basket Centrifuge (Stainless Steel)
shortDescription: Sanborn stainless steel sanitary perforated basket centrifuge, 48 in. x 24 in., National Board stamped and pressure-rated. Single-action plow with 25 HP hydraulic drive, maximum 1150 rpm.
description: Unused Sanborn 48″ X 24″ stainless steel pressure casing sanitary construction basket centrifuge. Tested to 30 psi operating pressure 20 psi @ 650°F. National Board stamped. Single action plow – rinse and wash nozzles vibration switch. Maximum rpm of 1150. 95#/cubic foot load rating. 25 HP 3 phase, 60 cycle, 460 volt, Volvo hydraulic drive.

title: Krauss Maffei HZ125 Horizontal Peeler Centrifuge (Stainless Steel)
shortDescription: Used Krauss Maffei HZ125 stainless steel horizontal peeler centrifuge with a 1250 mm diameter basket, 2.45 sq m filtration area and maximum basket speed of 1200 rpm.
description: Used Krauss Maffei model HZ125 stainless steel horizontal peeler centrifuge. Has 1250mm diameter basket with 2.45sqmt filtration area. Maximum basket volume 323dm3, maximum basket speed at 1,200rpm.

title: Heinkel HF-600.1 Inverting Filter Centrifuge (600mm, Hastelloy C22)
shortDescription: Heinkel HF-600.1 inverting filter centrifuge with 600 mm Hastelloy C22 wetted parts, 0.45 sq m filter area, max speed 1940 rpm and explosion-proof drives. CE and TUV certified.
description: 600mm diameter Hastelloy C22 wetted parts Heinkel HF-600.1 inverting filter centrifuge, fabrik #1246/11, 0.45 square meter filter area, max speed 1940 rpm, load 65kg (52 liter), max G-Force 1250, explosion class E Exde II CT4, non-wetted parts 316L stainless steel (1.4571), Teflon seals, basket driven by 22 kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, inverting mechanism driven by 5.5 kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, feed pipe with 1.5kw, 3/50/500 volt, 1500 rpm E Exd II CT4 motor, hinged front door, control panels, CE and TUV certified

title: Heine 850mm x 400mm Perforated Basket Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Heine 850 mm diameter x 400 mm deep 316 stainless steel perforated basket centrifuge, serial #6886. Top load/unload, basket speed 1300 rpm, 150 kg load driven by an explosion-proof hydraulic powerpak.
description: 850mm diameter x 400mm deep, 316S stainless steel perforated basket centrifuge. Manufactured by Heine, serial #6886. Material of construction V4AE. Basket speed 1300 rpm. 5mm wall thickness. 150 Kg load. 5″ cake thickness. Top load/unload. basket was driven by 5.5 KW, 3/50/380 volt explosion proof hydraulic powerpak. Openings: 1-1″ feed, 1-1 1/2″ vapour, 1-3″ filtrate, top cover: 2-4″ sight glasses, 2-1″.

title: Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 Separator Centrifuge (Stainless Steel)
shortDescription: Little-used Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 stainless steel separator with a 15.0 kW explosion-proof motor, inert gas system and all controls included.
description: Little used Alfa Laval CHB 209T-15CEFP-50 stainless steel separator. Brook Cromptoon ex. proof motor 15,0 kW/50Hz. Inert gas system. All controls included.

title: Alfa Laval NX 210 Solid-Bowl Decanter Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Alfa Laval NX 210 316SS solid-bowl decanter centrifuge with a conical bowl, maximum bowl speed of 3250 rpm and a 5 in. double-lead hardsurfaced conveyor. Supplied without motor or gearbox.
description: Max bowl speed 3250 RPM, conical bowl, 5″ double lead hardsurfaced conveyor. No motor, no gearbox. Very good condition.

title: Alfa Laval UVNX 716B-11G Tricanter Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Alfa Laval UVNX 716B-11G 316SS tricanter centrifuge, maximum bowl speed 4000 rpm with a 110 mm single-lead hardsurfaced conveyor, 15 kW motor and 159:1 gearbox, unitized on a stand. Prior use olive oil, 1988 vintage.
description: Max bowl speed 4000 RPM, 110mm single lead hardsurfaced conveyor, 15 KW motor 460/3/60/1800 RPM, 159:1 gearbox with torque-arm assembly and limit switch, feed tube, guards and vibration isolators. Unitized on a stand with chutes. Prior use: Olive oil. 1988 vintage. Very good condition

title: ATM 40" x 24" Perforate Basket Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: ATM 40 in. x 24 in. 316SS perforate basket centrifuge rated at 9 cu ft cake capacity, maximum bowl speed 1250 rpm, with single-motion pneumatic plow and 40 HP hydraulic drive power pack.
description: Max bowl speed 1250 RPM, rated @ 9 cuft cake capacity. solid SS curb and cover, single motion pneumatic plow, cake detector, speed sensor, pneumatic locks on cover, hydraulic drive with 40 HP power pack. Very good condition.

title: Bird 18" x 28" Solid-Bowl Decanter Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Bird 18 in. x 28 in. 316SS solid-bowl decanter centrifuge, maximum bowl speed 3000 rpm (2300 x G), 3 in. double-lead hardsurfaced conveyor, 25 HP motor and 140:1 gearbox. 1974 vintage.
description: Max bowl speed 3000 RPM, 2300 x G, 9 degree beach angle, 3″ double lead hardsurfaced conveyor, 25 HP motor 460/3/60/1750 RPM, PA-69 140:1 gearbox with TA assembly, guards, feed tube and chutes. 1974 vintage. Very good condition.

title: Bird HB-2500 Solid-Bowl Decanter Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Bird HB-2500 316SS solid-bowl decanter centrifuge, maximum bowl speed 1800 rpm, 8-degree contour bowl with end discharge, 6 in. single-lead conveyor, 40 HP motor and 80:1 gearbox.
description: Max bowl speed 1800 RPM, 8 degree contour bowl, end discharge, 6″ single lead conveyor, 40 HP motor 460/3/ 60/1775 RPM, SA-69 80:1 gearbox, pulley backdrive and feed tube on base plate. Very good condition.

title: CBB CD 40I-SP Sanitary Decanter Centrifuge (Duplex SS)
shortDescription: CBB CD 40I-SP Duplex stainless steel sanitary decanter centrifuge, maximum bowl speed 4000 rpm (3725 x G), ceramic-lined feed zone, 30 HP motor and PLC/HMI control panel with VFD. Prior use corn ethanol, 2014 vintage.
description: Max bowl speed 4000 RPM, 3725 x G, 15 x 65″ bowl ID. Ceramic-lined feed zone and cake ports, 110mm single lead TC sprayed conveyor, 30 HP motor 460/3/60, cyclo gearbox, hydraulic backdrive system, limit switch, solids scraper with motor, guards, feed tube and chutes unitized on a stand with vibration isolators and PLC/HMI control panel with VFD. Prior use: corn ethanol. 2014 vintage. Excellent condition.

title: Andritz D5LL Solid-Bowl Decanter Centrifuge (316SS)
shortDescription: Andritz D5LL (type D5LLC30CHP) 316 stainless steel decanter centrifuge with a 520 mm diameter bowl, nominal speed 3000 rpm (max 3200 rpm) and approximate flow rate of 65,000 liters/hr. New in 2002, serial #0240; less motor and gearbox.
description: Andritz decanter centrifuge, model D5LL, type D5LLC30CHP. Unit has a nominal speed of 3000 RPM and a maximum speed of 3200 RPM. Minimum temperature of – 30 deg. F., max temperature of 70 deg. F. Bowl measures 520mm diameter. Unit has an approximate flow rate of 65,000 liters/hr. Bowl is constructed of 316 stainless steel. Includes fiberglass cover. Less motor and gearbox. New in 2002, serial # 0240.
